column1: # Partition table for the Remote-ID-enabled ESP32-S3 build on 4 MB flash (Config 2: ESP32-S3-MINI-1U-N4R2
# 4 MB flash is tight once the NimBLE + WiFi + coexistence stacks are included. The factory app gets ~2.9 MB
# fit the full BLE + WiFi image (measure at M0/M4; strip logging / web assets if it overflows). No OTA
# partition (reclaim the space for the app). NVS/phy_init match the stock layout.
